case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, Y FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY BILL HALL BAIL BONDS
CASH SUBSTITUTION OF SURETY BONDS. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY BILL HALL BAIL BONDS $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,580.00
